creator: cpiazza@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This problem has been fixed in the latest ports tree. 
If you don't want to cvsup or update by other means fetching 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/x11/kdebase11/patches/patch-az?rev=1.1 and putting that in ports/x11/kdebase11/patches/ and rebuilding should fix 
the problem.
